prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SVT-SOUTHWESTBLANKET-BLUARR Product Type: BLANKET Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Wilderness Adventure Fleece Blanket Blue Southwest Style 50 x 60 In Description: Add some Southwestern flare to your home decor or campground with the ASR Outdoor Wilderness Adventure Blanket.

This soft throw blanket is made of polar fleece, ideal for indoor or outdoor use. The polyester blend will ensure you keep warm whether you're cuddled up at home or looking for some extra warmth in your tent or on the beach.

It measures 50" x 60", making it the perfect size for draping over your bed, favorite chair, in your tent or under your beach umbrella. It is machine wash and dry safe so you'll never need to worry about it shrinking. The fun Southwest style pattern will be sure to start conversations whether you're at home or out in the wilderness. Search Terms: home decor fleece throw throw blankets camping blankets fleece blankets Features: - ASR Outdoor Southwest Style Throw Blanket - Blue Polar Fleece - Polyester Blend | Machine Wash & Dry Safe - Dimensions: 50" x 60" - Perfect Size Home or Camping - Fun Southwest Style Pattern Adds Unique Look to Home Decor or Outdoor Gear - Ensures Added Warmth Indoors or Outdoors === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 50x60 in Blue Southwest Fleece Blanket

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 50 x 60 in Blue Fleece Blanket

anthropic.title_differentiation: Polar Fleece Throw, Machine Wash And Dry Safe, Southwest Pattern, Camping And Home Decor, Polyester Blend

openai.title_differentiation: Southwest Style, Polar Fleece, Machine Wash And Dry Safe, Indoor And Outdoor Warmth, Home And Camping Use
